WWW-Authenticate.description: Optional RFC 6750 Bearer challenge on 401 responses

NotFoundProblem.description: Endpoint or resource was not found

AdminPlanItem.description: Admin plan response. Prices are always integer minor currency units.

ConfigActivationPending.description:
The only body-bearing success arm of `PATCH /{secure_path}/config`.
A fully activated write instead returns an empty 204 response.

PendingActivation.description:
Single-value discriminator kept as an enum so OpenAPI and generated
clients constrain the wire value instead of widening it to `string`.

allOf.description: RFC 9457 body emitted by every modern internal API error.

detail.description: Locale-aware presentation text; clients must discriminate on `code`.

errors.description: Present only for `validation_failed`; first message is primary.

title.description: Generic English HTTP reason phrase for `status`.

type.description: RFC 9457 problem type. The service currently uses the default URI.

info.description: Generated contract for the modern, non-frozen internal API
info.title: V2Board internal API
